name: Trolli Gummi Pop Eye 16g (Glotzer) Gluten Free
description:
Trolli Gummi Pop Eye 16g (Glotzer) – A Gummy Treat That Looks Spooky and Tastes Sweet!

At Sweets World, we love fun and playful treats—and the Trolli Gummi Pop Eye 16g is a great example! This spooky-looking gummy is shaped just like a realistic eyeball, but don’t let the look fool you—it’s soft, chewy, and bursting with fruity flavour.

Made by Trolli, a brand known for its creative and delicious gummy candies, the Trolli Gummi Pop Eye 16g is perfect for Halloween parties, prank snacks, or just a fun treat to surprise your friends.

Each gummy is filled with a gooey centre that oozes out when you bite into it, adding extra fun and flavour to every bite. It’s creepy on the outside, but super tasty on the inside!

Kids and adults alike love the mix of fun appearance and fruity taste. Whether you're creating a themed lolly bag or want something different to snack on, this gummy eyeball is sure to be a hit.

At Sweets World, we offer chocolates, lollies, drinks, groceries, gifts, and more from all over the world. The Trolli Gummi Pop Eye 16g is a fun and quirky candy that’s perfect for sweet lovers who like a little surprise with their sweets!
